mapper.select: SELECT id, notice_title, notice_content, notice_type, publish_user_id, publish_user_name, publish_time, status, top_flag, top_end_time, read_count FROM community_notice WHERE (#{noticeTitle} IS NULL OR notice_title = #{noticeTitle}) AND (#{noticeContent} IS NULL OR notice_content = #{noticeContent}) AND (#{noticeType} IS NULL OR notice_type = #{noticeType}) AND (#{publishUserId} IS NULL OR publish_user_id = #{publishUserId}) AND (#{publishUserName} IS NULL OR publish_user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{publishUserName}, '%')) AND (#{publishTime} IS NULL OR DATE(publish_time) = DATE(#{publishTime})) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR status = #{status}) AND (#{topFlag} IS NULL OR top_flag = #{topFlag}) AND (#{topEndTime} IS NULL OR DATE(top_end_time) = DATE(#{topEndTime})) AND (#{readCount} IS NULL OR read_count = #{readCount})

SELECT notice_id, notice_title, notice_content, notice_type, publish_user_id, publish_user_name, publish_time, status, top_flag, top_end_time, read_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM community_notice WHERE notice_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_notice ( notice_title, notice_content, notice_type, publish_user_id, publish_user_name, publish_time, status, top_flag, top_end_time, read_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, #{noticeType}, #{publishUserId}, #{publishUserName}, #{publishTime}, #{status}, #{topFlag}, #{topEndTime}, #{readCount}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_notice SET notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, publish_user_id = #{publishUserId}, publish_user_name = #{publishUserName}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, status = #{status}, top_flag = #{topFlag}, top_end_time = #{topEndTime}, read_count = #{readCount}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} WHERE notice_id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_notice WHERE notice_id IN (${ids})
